name: Nexus International School (Singapore)
tagline: Innovative IB World School with Apple Distinguished School status
description: Nexus International School (Singapore) is an innovative IB World School offering the full IB continuum (PYP, MYP, DP) for learners aged 3 to 18. The school moved to its purpose-built Aljunied campus in 2020, featuring flexible learning spaces designed to foster creativity and collaboration. Nexus is an Apple Distinguished School, integrating technology meaningfully across the curriculum. With a strong focus on personalised, inquiry-based learning, Nexus is known for smaller class sizes and a nurturing community that values each child's individual learning journey.

admission.process: Nexus welcomes applications year-round. The school looks for learners who will benefit from its inquiry-based approach and contribute positively to the community.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions. A non-refundable application fee of SGD 864 applies.
admission.assessmentInfo: Age-appropriate assessments and a family interview. EAL support available for students needing English language development.

faqs.question: What makes Nexus unique?
faqs.answer: Nexus is an Apple Distinguished School with a strong technology integration philosophy. Its purpose-built campus (opened 2020) features flexible, open learning spaces rather than traditional classrooms. Small class sizes (avg. 18) ensure personalised attention.

faqs.question: Is Nexus a new school?
faqs.answer: Nexus was founded in 2011 but moved to its current purpose-built Aljunied campus in 2020. The school has a strong track record of IB results and university placements.

seo.description: Nexus International School: Apple Distinguished IB World School in Singapore for ages 3-18. View 2025/2026 fees, IB programmes (PYP, MYP, DP) and admission.
